name: list_conversations
description: Retrieve a paginated list of conversations across all inboxes. Supports filtering by status, assignee, and tags.

parameters.name: q
parameters.description: Search query to filter conversations by subject or content.

parameters.name: page_token
parameters.description: Pagination token for fetching the next page of results.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of conversations to return per page. Default 50.

last_message.body: I have a question about my invoice.
